sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77656" key="panto/mwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παντό-μωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n77656.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-foolish</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πάνυ βορός</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gluttonous</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
